summary: Fans recall a memorable Springfield show with house lights on during a Samson & Delilah jam; recording source is unknown but the performance is fondly remembered.
review: The single review highlights an enthusiastic personal memory of the last general‑seating Dead concert in the Northeast, noting that the second set opened with the house lights on for a strong rendition of Samson & Delilah. No technical details about the audio are provided, so the recording source and fidelity remain unclear, but the overall sentiment is positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4‑star) with enthusiastic comments about the show; no information on recording quality, so rating reflects strong show impression but uncertain audio fidelity.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer does not comment on sound clarity, mix, or source type; only personal experience is mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set began with the house lights on for the first half, an unusual atmosphere that the reviewer highlights positively.
